positive: A whimsical, celestial forest scene viewed through a geometric prism. The composition features large, stylized, bioluminescent flora and fauna (e.g., glowing, iridescent mushrooms, abstract winged moths, and gentle, abstract glowing creatures) framed by clean, interlocking geometric patterns resembling stained glass. The color palette should be limited to deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, cosmic lavenders, and touches of bright metallic gold luminescence. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau curvature and modern Low Poly crystalline structure, ensuring clean, bold silhouettes and high contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered, designed to repeat cleanly across fabric (seamless suitability), with visible negative space providing a stylized border effect. Crisp linework, volumetric lighting, and strong graphic impact.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, noisy, grainy, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, deformed, low contrast, busy background, photographic, realism, muted colors
